title: goniopteris deltata
intro: Goniopteris deltata, also known as the delta-fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health issues. The health benefits of Goniopteris deltata include its ability to aid in reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health. In traditional herbal preparations, Goniopteris deltata is often used as a tea or tincture, with some cultures also using it in poultices or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
